patch.value: pm focus: session default parent/context inheritance for new items (GH-161)
Opt-in focused context (e.g. pm focus pm-epic1) so subsequent creates default --parent to the focused item; clear via pm focus --clear. GitHub issue #161.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Design (GH-161 pm focus): store pointer in NEW gitignored .agents/pm/runtime/session.json (session-local, NOT git-tracked settings). New core session-state helper. Command pm focus [id]/--clear/no-arg=show. create.ts defaults --parent to focus when none given (flows through existing locateItem/validateMissingParentReference). Validate id exists on set. Wire register-mutation, FLAG_CONTRACTS, cli-contracts NO_SURFACE, MCP pm_focus + param tables, completion, help-content, docs, golden (pnpm contracts:update), .gitignore. 100% cov.

value.author: focus-context-agent
value.text:
Implemented pm focus (GH-161). Session focused-parent context.

STORAGE DECISION: new gitignored session-local file .agents/pm/runtime/session.json (shape: {"focused_item":"pm-xxxx"}). NOT settings.json (git-tracked). Added to .gitignore beside other runtime/* cache files. Missing/corrupt/array/null/non-string -> empty state (graceful). New core module src/core/session/session-state.ts: readSessionState/getFocusedItem/setFocusedItem/clearFocusedItem/getSessionStatePath; atomic write via writeFileAtomic + fs.mkdir recursive (mirrors front-matter-cache fs pattern).

COMMAND: src/cli/commands/focus.ts runFocus(id?, {clear?}, global). pm focus <id> validates via locateItem (NOT_FOUND error otherwise), normalizes id, persists, returns {action:set, focused_item, title, message}. pm focus shows current (or no-focus hint). pm focus --clear clears. pm focus --clear <id> = USAGE error. Title hint normalized: empty/blank title -> null (no suffix).

CREATE INJECTION (src/cli/commands/create.ts ~line 1683): when resolvedOptions.parent===undefined AND parent not being unset, default parent to focused item with parentSource=focus. Flows through EXISTING locateItem/validateMissingParentReference (stale focus -> same missing-parent error/warning). Explicit --parent (incl --parent none) overrides. New CreateResult.parent_source?:'focus' in output (only when inherited; token-efficient).

SURFACES WIRED (full checklist): register-mutation.ts (commander focus cmd, lazy import); enum-contracts.ts PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES + PM_TOOL_ACTIONS (focus); cli-contracts.ts FOCUS_FLAG_CONTRACTS (--clear) + switch case + PM_TOOL_ACTION_SCHEMA_CONTRACTS focus:{optional:[id,clear]}; tool-parameter-tables.ts clear property+metadata; MCP tool-definitions.ts pm_focus tool; server.ts case 'focus' dispatch (options.clear|args.clear) + pm_focus HANDLERS + runFocus import + narrow-tools instructions string; commands/index.ts barrel export runFocus; completion.ts bash/zsh/fish (cmd list via PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES auto + per-cmd flag blocks + FOCUS_FLAGS); help-content.ts focus bundle; docs/COMMANDS.md (Lifecycle family row + Focus section); golden tests/fixtures/contracts/full.json regenerated (pnpm contracts:update, check green). Doc count 25->26 in README/CLAUDE_CODE_PLUGIN/plugin README+plugin.json+pm-init.md/codex README + smoke-claude-plugin.mjs required[] + comment.

TESTS: tests/unit/commands/focus-command.spec.ts (set/show/clear/nonexistent/--clear+id conflict/empty-title/deleted-focus show + create inheritance: inherit+parent_source, explicit override, cleared no-inherit, stale-focus error). tests/unit/core/session/session-state.spec.ts (read/write/overwrite/clear/missing/corrupt/array/null/non-string/blank). MCP: added runFocus mock + 3 focus runAction calls (id, options.clear, args.clear) to mcp-server-branch-residual.spec.ts. mcp-handshake.spec.ts EXPECTED_TOOL_NAMES + length 25->26. smoke-claude-plugin.spec.ts REQUIRED_TOOLS + smoke-claude-plugin.mjs required[].

COVERAGE: focus.ts 100/100/100/100, session-state.ts 100% (all metrics), create.ts stays 100/100/100/100 (verified targeted). Static-quality-gate + docs-skills gate + contracts:check all green. typecheck + build clean.

SURPRISES/RISKS: (1) ItemMetadata.title is required string so '?? null' was an uncoverable dead branch -> replaced with nonEmptyTitleOrNull(trim). (2) runCreate({title:''}) stores '' (not undefined) unlike CLI --title '' which stores undefined; tests account for this. (3) The shared working tree also has another agent's update-many.ts/spec changes (NOT touched by me) and a stray pm-v4tb item -> left alone per ownership. (4) pm completion is a package action; generators are source-tested directly (focus present in all 3 shells). Do NOT close - lead will.

patch.value: Added: pm focus [id]/--clear sets a session-local focused item (.agents/pm/runtime/session.json) so subsequent pm create calls inherit it as --parent (parent_source:focus); explicit --parent overrides. Wired CLI, MCP pm_focus, contracts, completion, docs.
New pm focus [id]/--clear command + session-local .agents/pm/runtime/session.json store; create.ts defaults --parent to focused item when none given; full surface wiring + 100% tests.
Agents set a focused item once and subsequent creates inherit it as parent without repeating --parent.
